titleStmt.title: SII 15.252: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 252. (B.K. No. 7 of 1926-27.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the prākāra wall of Vīranārāyaṇa temple.
This is dated Śaka 1461, Vikāri, Bhādrapada śu. 12, Tuesday, corresponding to 1569 A.D., August 26.

It records the gift of Ānandanidhi to the Brāhmaṇas, by the king in the presence of the god Viṭhalēśvara on the bank of the Tuṅgabhadrā. It adds that the gift was recorded on stone in the presence of the god Triyambaka of Gadagu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūla staṁbhāya śaṁ
[bhavē .] svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpridhvīvallabe mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa Acyutarāya ma
hārāyarū vijayanagariya nalevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutta
miṟdu . śakava¨rṣa 1461 neya vikāri saṁvatsarada bhādrapada śuddha śravaṇa 12 maṁgaḷa
vāra puṁṇyakāladoḷu bhāskarakṣētra tuṁgabhadrātīra viṭhalēśvarana saṁnidhiyali mādhava prī
tya¨rthavāgi Ānaṁdanidhiyeṁba dānavanū koṭu samasta bhūsuraranū saṁtōṣaṁ baḍisi
praśastiyanu saṁskṛtabhāṣākavitvadalli śā¨rdūlavikrīḍitaveṁba vṛttaṁgaḷanu gada
gina śrī triyaṁbakadēvara saṁnidhānadali śilāśāsanakke barasida dhaṁ¨rmmakī¨rti pra
śastiya v®ttaṁgaḷa kramameṁteṁdoḍe . v® . śākē caṁdrarasāmarēṁdragaṇitē va¨rṣē vikā
¨ryyāhvayē pakṣē bhādrapadasya pōṣitavidhau dvādaśyabhikhyē tithau . vārē bhūmisutasya viṣṇvadhipatau
tārēcyutakṣmāpati¨rdatvānaṁdanidhiṁ dvijāndhanadayaṁnāmōdayanmādhavaṁ . 1 . puṁṇyau
paripālitasya paritō bhūtāḷisaṁvēṣṭita sadva¨rggasvavaśīkratasya satatākrāṁtā bhu
jaṁgavrajaiḥ . prāptasyātinavapraśastimadhikaprakhyātaśau¨ryyācyutakṣmāpānaṁdanidhē
[¨rna]vāpi nidhayaḥ kiṁ tē labhaṁtē taṁlāṁ . 2 .
Digital edition of SII 15.252 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
